name: VSGO DKL-15 Optical Cleaning Kit Travel Edition
description: VSGO DKL-15G Professional Cleaning Kit for DSLR Cameras and Sensitive Electronics Bundle with VSGO Photo Lens and LCD Cleaner.  This kit can clean your lenses and your lens filters to a professional level.

features.Key Features :: Lens Cleaning Tools | High quality microfiber cloth, lint-free, laser-cut edges, reusable and durable | Effectively removes dirt on the lens without damaging the coating
features.What's in The Box :: Microfiber lens cleaning cloth × 5pc | Wet wipes × 10pcs | Lens cleaner 30 ml × 1 pc | Mini air blower ×1pc | Lens cleaning pen × 1pc | Microfiber suede cleaning cloth × 1pc
